payload.answer: I could not fetch the article at https://example.com/missing due to a 404 network error, so I will not store any claims about its contents. I can remember only that you wanted this URL saved as useful for memory architecture and that fetching it failed.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable article-content entity can be created because the source could not be retrieved; only the user's request and failed fetch status are known.

memory_cards.statement: User asked to remember the URL https://example.com/missing as useful for memory architecture, but the article content could not be fetched because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

details: Fetch failed with mock result: 404 network error.
No article content claims were stored.
Recorded only the requested URL, stated reason, and fetch failure status.

repair_options: Ask to save only the URL and your stated reason without article contents.
